description: Mode is a collaborative analytics platform for building queries, reports, dashboards, and managing workspace data access. It also offers enterprise usage-data access through its Discovery API and Discovery Database features.
summary: Mode exposes two documented developer HTTP APIs on app.mode.com: a REST API authenticated with Basic auth using a Mode API token, and a read-only Discovery API under /batch authenticated with a generated Bearer signature-token bundle (with signature-token management itself using the regular API token).
